description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (Windows using VCPKG) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring changes to markdown files, LICENSE, and build directories. Use a build job that runs on a matrix of Windows OS versions, architectures, and build types. Install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, and configure VCPKG. Then, configure CMake with VCPKG and build the project.
